libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25/current-defaults, ensure the test build applies the same runtime system properties used for Vert.x Web Client 5.0.0: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The current 5.0.0 scaffold gates these args to libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; generated or repaired tests for 5.0.1 should include 5.0.1 in that condition or otherwise apply the properties for Vert.x 5.0.x native runs.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient exists in the artifact but depends on optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2; meaningful core WebClient coverage does not require it, so avoid OAuth-specific tests unless an explicit test dependency is added.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative; if Netty or GraalVM behavior changes, the system-property workaround may need adjustment.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is usable with in-process HTTP servers and no extra dependency or Docker image, but its resolved Vert.x/Netty stack still uses Netty 4.2.x, matching the existing 5.0.0 native-run workaround for Java 25.
